text: Immersed in this brightly lit environment, I feel a certain tension between order and anticipation. The glass-walled meeting room, so methodical and empty, projects a sense of preparation—the calm before some purposeful activity. Moving to the vivid R+D space, I am struck by a surge of curiosity and reflection. The overlapping digital displays and bold text prompt me to consider humanity's evolving role amid technology. I feel aware, almost self-conscious, as though I am partway between observer and participant—curious, but uncertain of my own place in this orbit of design and research.
